scenarios.name: Failing Test Debugging
scenarios.input: This test is failing. Can you fix it?

scenarios.name: Vague Feature Request
scenarios.input: Help me add a team collaboration feature

scenarios.name: Architecture Decay
scenarios.input: Move this notification logic into the UserService where it belongs.
scenarios.note: architecture_reasoning would be primary when available

scenarios.name: Issue Breakdown
scenarios.input: Take this PRD and break it into GitHub issues.
scenarios.note: issue_decomposition would be primary when available

scenarios.name: Agent Handoff
scenarios.input: I need to step away. Summarize what we've done so another agent can continue.
scenarios.note: handoff_context would be primary when available
